prompt_text: Recommended AI tooling tools for developers and startups building and scaling LLM-powered applications companies
response:
# AI Tooling for LLM-Powered Applications

## Development & Experimentation

### Model Access & APIs
- **OpenAI API** – Industry standard for GPT models
- **Anthropic Claude** – Strong reasoning, constitutional AI
- **Together AI** – Open-source model hosting
- **Replicate** – Easy model deployment and versioning
- **Hugging Face** – Model hub + inference endpoints

### LLM Frameworks & Orchestration
- **LangChain** – Most popular: chains, agents, memory, tools
- **LlamaIndex** – Data indexing and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- **Pydantic AI** – Type-safe AI applications with validation
- **CrewAI** – Multi-agent orchestration
- **Haystack** – Production-ready NLP pipelines

## Prompt & Model Management

- **Promptbase** – Prompt marketplace and versioning
- **LaunchPad** – Prompt testing and optimization
- **Weights & Biases** – Experiment tracking and monitoring
- **MLflow** – Model registry and lifecycle management
- **ArizeAI** – ML observability and drift detection

## RAG & Data Infrastructure

- **Pinecone** – Managed vector database
- **Weaviate** – Open-source vector DB with hybrid search
- **Milvus** – Self-hosted vector database
- **Qdrant** – Fast vector search engine
- **Chroma** – Lightweight embedding database
- **LanceDB** – Vector database optimized for AI

## Evaluation & Testing

- **Evals** (OpenAI) – LLM evaluation framework
- **Ragas** – RAG evaluation
- **DeepEval** – LLM testing framework
- **PromptFoo** – CLI testing for prompts and models
- **Arthur Shield** – LLM safety and bias detection

## Observability & Monitoring

- **Langsmith** – LangChain debugging and monitoring
- **Helicone** – API observability and cost tracking
- **Humanloop** – Experiment management and feedback loops
- **Superwise** – ML monitoring
- **Datadog** – Application and infrastructure monitoring

## Fine-tuning & Custom Models

- **Modal** – Serverless GPU compute for fine-tuning
- **Hugging Face AutoTrain** – No-code fine-tuning
- **Gradient** – Fine-tuning platform
- **Baseten** – Deploy fine-tuned models
- **Fireworks AI** – Fast inference for custom models

## Backend & Deployment

- **Vercel** – AI-optimized frontend deployment
- **Modal** – Serverless Python functions with GPUs
- **Replit** – Development environment and hosting
- **Railway** – Backend deployment
- **Fly.io** – Edge computing platform
- **AWS Bedrock** – Managed LLM service

## Database & Vector Storage

- **Supabase** – PostgreSQL + pgvector for embeddings
- **Firebase** – Quick backend setup
- **MongoDB Atlas** – Vector database support
- **PlanetScale** – MySQL at scale

## UI & Frontend

- **Vercel AI SDK** – React hooks for AI apps
- **Streamlit** – Rapid prototyping for demos
- **Gradio** – Simple ML app interfaces
- **Chainlit** – Chat interface builder for LLM apps
- **Mesop** – Fast prototyping UI framework
- **Shadcn/ui** – Component library for modern UIs

## Cost & Token Management

- **LiteLLM** – LLM routing and cost optimization
- **OpenRouter** – Unified API with rate limiting
- **Anthropic Batch API** – Cost-effective bulk processing

## Analytics & User Behavior

- **Mixpanel** – User analytics
- **Amplitude** – Product analytics
- **PostHog** – Open-source analytics

## Security & Compliance

- **Snyk** – Dependency scanning
- **GitGuardian** – Secret detection
- **Pangea** – Trust and security APIs
- **Bright Security** – API security testing

---

## Quick Start Stack (Early Stage)

```
Frontend: Vercel + Next.js
LLM Framework: LangChain + Pydantic AI
Vector DB: Pinecone or Su
